[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0001101100 4
1 0110000101 4
2 1100110010 5
3 0110111010 6
4 1100100111 6
5 0100011011 5
6 0111101111 8
7 1100111110 7
